BLACKSMITH.title: Blacksmith
BLACKSMITH.pages.INITIAL.description: You enter a blacksmith's shop filled with heat. The furnace roars as the blacksmith swings their hammer. They notice you and pause their work. "What can I help you with?"
BLACKSMITH.pages.INITIAL.options.FUSE.de: Choose 2 cards to fuse into a higher rarity card.
BLACKSMITH.pages.FUSE_PROMPT.title: Select Cards to Fuse
BLACKSMITH.pages.FUSE_PROMPT.description: Select 2 cards to fuse. Same rarity guarantees higher rarity. Different rarity has 60% chance for higher rarity.
BLACKSMITH.pages.UPGRADED.description: The blacksmith skillfully upgrades your cards. "Come back anytime!" they wave goodbye.
BLACKSMITH.pages.FUSED.description: The blacksmith throws the two cards into the furnace. Sparks fly, and a brand new card emerges.
BLACKSMITH.pages.NO_CARDS.description: The blacksmith shakes their head. "You don't have anything I can help with."
BLACKSMITH.pages.CANCELLED.description: You decide to leave the blacksmith's shop.
BLACKSMITH.pages.FUSE_FAILED.description: The fusion failed. The blacksmith shrugs helplessly.
